authenticity.notes: Authenticity check passed: article has enough specificity, business relevance, source alignment, and trend support.

notes: The article provides practical, step-by-step guidance for implementing Google AI Max in business workflows.
Content is well-structured around a real-world case study (digital marketing agency) which adds credibility and applicability.
The article includes clear implementation steps, tools needed, and specific KPIs to track.
It addresses common mistakes and troubleshooting scenarios, which increases its value for practitioners.
Use of authoritative sources and data points like time saved and conversion increases supports the article's claims.
Content includes an implementation checklist and FAQ, improving usability for readers.
recommendedFixes: Add a visual workflow diagram to illustrate the steps in the automation process, as suggested by the mediaRecommendations field in frontmatter.
Include a downloadable checklist or workflow diagram as an asset to increase engagement and provide added value.
Clarify the distinction between Google AI Max and other Google automation tools to avoid confusion for new users.
Consider adding an example template or sample workflow configuration for the tools mentioned (e.g., Zapier, CRM settings) for better hands-on implementation guidance.
Add a section on 'how to verify AI Max is working as intended' for quality assurance during implementation.
